understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate selectable pieces and pushable blocks through a grid with obstacles, ultimately positioning one or more pushable objects onto the goal squares marked by '+' on the semantic grid in order to win each level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs in discrete cell steps (3 pixels per action) using the four cardinal directions. Some pieces are pushable and can be manipulated by the selected piece when adjacent; walls may block movement depending on their type. Control can be switched to any selectable piece via the CLICK action with a target position, facilitating puzzle-solving with multiple controllable pieces. Success depends on understanding grid layout, object interactions, and managing the limited step budget.
